zh.Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson於1025年之前出生在瑞士波格時，他的父親Baron Adalbert of Grandson II23歲，母親Tiedberge von Rheinfelden18歲。他和Mrs. Letburge De Grandson至少有6個兒子。他去世於1049年9月27日之後在瑞士波格a特爾。

zh-hans.Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy: 法国諾門迪瑟-馬利勒 哈福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson于1025年之前出生在瑞士波格时，他的父亲Baron Adalbert of Grandson II23岁，母亲Tiedberge von Rheinfelden18岁。他和Mrs. Letburge De Grandson至少有6个儿子。他去世于1049年9月27日之后在瑞士波格a特爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Adalbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson was born before 1025, in Neuchâtel, Switzerland, his father, Baron Adalbert of Grandson II, was 23 and his mother, Tiedberge von Rheinfelden, was 18. He had at least 6 sons with Mrs. Letburge De Grandson. He died after 27 September 1049, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson est né avant 1025, à Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse, son père, Baron Adalbert of Grandson II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Tiedberge von Rheinfelden, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Mrs. Letburge De Grandson. Il est décédé après 27 septembre 1049, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson vor 1025 in Neuenburg, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Adalbert of Grandson II 23 und seine Mutter Tiedberge von Rheinfelden 18. Er hatte mit Mrs. Letburge De Grandson mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb nach 27. September 1049 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson è nato il prima del 1025 nel Neuchâtel, Svizzera, il suo padre, Baron Adalbert of Grandson II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Tiedberge von Rheinfelden, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Mrs. Letburge De Grandson. Morì dopo il 27 settembre 1049, nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera.

ja.Neuchatel, Switzerland: スイスネウエンブルグ
ja.Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland: スイスネウエンブルグネウチaテル
ja.Le Havre, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy: フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメル ハvア
ja.lifeSummary: Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandsonが1025年以前にスイスネウエンブルグで生まれた時，父Baron Adalbert of Grandson IIは23歳，母Tiedberge von Rheinfeldenは18歳であった。彼はMrs. Letburge De Grandsonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1049年9月27日以後にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson(이)가 1025년 이전 스위스 니우버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Adalbert of Grandson II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Tiedberge von Rheinfelden(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mrs. Letburge De Grandson(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1049년 9월 27일 이후 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 사망했다.

mn.before 1025–after 27 Sep 1049: 1025 оноос өмнө–1049 оны Есдүгээр сарын 27–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson nasceu antes 1025, em Neuenburg, Suiça, seu pai, Baron Adalbert of Grandson II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Tiedberge von Rheinfelden, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Mrs. Letburge De Grandson. Ele faleceu após 27 de setembro de 1049, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson родился перед 1025 г. в местности неуенбург, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Baron Adalbert of Grandson II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Tiedberge von Rheinfelden, 18. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Mrs. Letburge De Grandson. Он умер после 27 сентябрь 1049 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария.

sm.before 1025–after 27 Sep 1049: a'e le'I oo le 1025–ina ua ma'ea le 27 Setema 1049

es.before 1025–after 27 Sep 1049: antes de 1025–después de 27 de septiembre de 1049
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adalbert III 'Adalgold' de Grandson nació antes de 1025, en Neuenburg, Suiza, su papá, Baron Adalbert of Grandson II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Tiedberge von Rheinfelden, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Mrs. Letburge De Grandson. Murió después de 27 de septiembre de 1049, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza.
